theme: {"theme": [{"name": "国際市場向けリモコンの設計要件", "description": "この会議は、国際市場で販売するための新しいリモコンの設計要件について話し合う。", "conditions": "参加者はプロジェクトマネージャー、インダストリアルデザイナー、ユーザーインターフェース担当、マーケティング担当の4名。会議時間は25分。販売価格・原価・ターゲット市場・ユーザー特性に関する条件が与えられている。"}]}

discussion.description: introduction of participants and their roles
discussion.quote: [B] Okay. abstractive.overall: The project manager introduced the upcoming project to the team members and then the team members participated in an exercise in which they drew their favorite animal and discussed what they liked about the animal. The project manager talked about the project finances and selling prices. The team then discussed various features to consider in making the remote.
abstractive.actions: The industrial designer will work on the working design of the remote. The user interface designer will work on the technical functions of the remote. The marketing executive will work on what requirements the remote has to fulfill
abstractive.decisions: The remote will sell for 25 Euro. The remote will be sold on an international scale. The production costs cannot exceed 12.50 Euro.
abstractive.problems: Whether the remote will be used exclusively for televisions.

decisions.text: [B] Okay, we now need to discuss the project. so according to the brief we're gonna be selling this remote control for twenty five, and we're aiming to make fifty million. so we're gonna be selling this on an international scale. And we don't want it to cost any more than twelve fifty Euros, so fifty percent of the selling price. [D] 'Kay., can we just go over that again? [B] Sure. [D] Uh, so bas at twel Alright, yeah. Okay. So cost like production cost is twelve fifty, but selling price is that wholesale or retail? Like on the shelf. [B] All together. I dunno. I imagine That's a good question. [D] our sale anyway. Yeah, okay okay. [B] I imagine it probably is our sale actually because it's probably up to the retailer to sell it for whatever price they want.. [D] Okay. Mm-hmm. Alright.

[B] But I don't know, I mean do you think the fact that it's going to be sold internationally will have a bearing on how we design it at all? [B] Think it will?. [D] Mm-hmm. Mm-hmm. [D] Well right away I'm wondering if there's th th, like with D_V_D_ players, if there are zones. frequencies or something as well as characters, different keypad styles and symbols. [B] Oh yeah, regions and stuff, yeah. Yeah. Okay. [A] Hmm. [B] Yeah. Well for a remote control, do you think that will be I suppose depends on how complicated our remote control is. [D] . I don't know. Yeah. [A] It does make sense from maybe the design point of view 'cause you have more complicated characters like European languages, then you need more buttons. [B] Yeah, yeah. Okay. [D] Yeah. [A] So, possibly. [B] What, just like in terms of the wealth of the country? Like how much money people have to spend on things? [D] chara just a characteristic of the Just Or just like, basic product podi positioning, the twenty five Euro remote control might be a big hit in London, might not be such a big hit in Greece, who knows, something like that, yeah. [B] Aye, I see what you mean, yeah. Marketing. Good marketing thoughts. Oh gosh, I should be writing all this down..

[B] Yeah, yeah. how much does,, a remote control cost. [D] Uh-huh. [B] Well twenty five, that's about like eighteen pounds or something, isn't it? Or no, is it as much as that? Sixteen seventeen eighteen pounds. [D] Mm-hmm. Yep. Yeah, I'd say so, yeah. [B] , I dunno, I've never bought a remote control, so I don't know how how good a remote control that would get you.. [B] But yeah, I suppose it has to look kind of cool and gimmicky. [D] Mm-hmm. [B] right, okay.

A.participant_abstract: Meeting was called to kick-off the TV remote control project. A brief was given on the aims, budget and team for the project and product. The team consists of Laura (Project Manager), Creg (User-Interface Designer), Andrew (Marketing) and myself (David Industrial Designer).
A.participant_actions: A.. no clear stated action or directives were issued or given during the meeting. B.. implicit request to "go think about it"
A.participant_decisions: No substantial decisions about the project were made.
A.participant_problems: A.. Defining the project b.. Describing the product c.. Defining what the functions of the product. A.. Deciding and defining who is going off to do what? We have no feel for the strengths and weaknesses of the team and what our particular roles are for this project.

B.participant_abstract: The aim of this first "kick-off" meeting was to give the team members a chance to get to know each other, become familiar with the whiteboard and microphones, and discuss the project. My role was to make sure that the meeting kept to its time frame and agenda. I also tried to generate some enthusiasm for the project and a friendly atmosphere.
B.participant_actions: David (ID) - limitations imposed by costs - what functionalities can we provide with the financing restraints. Andrew (ME) - how to market product to different countries, selling points. Craig (UID) - technical spec
B.participant_decisions: Product should control multiple devices, eg VCR, DVD, Stereo, etc . Product should look good/trendy .
B.participant_problems: Not all of the team members were very vocal - expect this will change after they have carried out their tasks for the next meeting. I think we're all still a little unsure of what our roles are.

C.participant_abstract: Paragraph of coherent text to summarize the meeting as a whole from your role's perspective. It was suggested that the control be small and, if possible, multi-functioned -- providing services beyond the requirements of TV. David will be looking into viability of providing multiple funcitons in one device.
C.participant_actions: David: Checking viability of providing multiple functions in one device. Andrew: Find out what market 35EURO remote would appeal to. Me: Technical functionality.
C.participant_decisions: Should be easy to use Should provide enough functionality that it is attractive to a large market at the set price of 25EURO.
C.participant_problems: Can lots of devices be controlled? How large should device be?

D.participant_abstract: During this short meeting our team of four came together for the first time and took the opportunity to meet each other as well as deal with initial planning of a new television remote control design / production project. Each team member had already been assigned a role in the project however, the meeting did not call upon specific expertise or action planning. It was, rather, a general brainstorming discussion, setting out some of the goals that will be used to guide our work in the execution of this project. The meeting concluded with a vague action plan that each team member will begin work on. It was agreed that the next meeting would happen in 30 minutes.
D.participant_decisions: It was decided that the product will be international. Will aim to be trendy. Will be based on a television control priority. Will have a revenue target. Will be manufactured for 12.50? And sold for 25? Will aim to offer new features that are both functional and aesthetic in character. will aim to appeal to the chic, fashionable current designs.
